key_specs: {"piece_count":"2 x 12-piece puzzles","dimensions":"approx 21 x 30 cm each completed","materials":"Chunky wipe-clean cardboard","included_items":"Two farm-animal jigsaws; talk guide on box","other":"Strong colour/background clues on each piece"}
product_description_under_30_words: Two chunky 12-piece farm jigsaws in one box. Wipe-clean cardboard pieces with bold background colours so the picture stays visible while they work.
ember_verdict: This is the step up from peg posting: real interlocking pieces, but the pig and cow scenes stay readable while they turn and compare. Strong visual clues mean frustration stays low — good third-birthday gift if peg puzzles are already easy.
personalization_hint: likely to be comparing piece shapes and turning them to match colours on the picture
why_it_fits: 12 pieces hits the strategy brief without jumping to 20+; UK-made Orchard quality; clear picture-first design; strong Amazon and brand-site proof.
caveats: Age mark says 2+ — honest for nearly three, not a fresh 18m buy. Start with one puzzle out; save the second for a win later in the week.
gift_note: Reliable small-box gift under £10; wrap-friendly and familiar on UK nursery shelves.
ownership_note: Skip if you already own Orchard 12-piece farm or jungle sets from a younger sibling — borrow a different theme first.
safety_notes: Not suitable under 3 years per small-parts warning on some Orchard 12-piece lines — supervise if mouthing is still common.
review_quality_note: Parents praise chunky pieces and wipe-clean board; some note 12 pieces is ambitious before 30m — right band for 34–36m.
evidence_sources: Amazon UK B08R6BWGX1 | orchardtoys.com product page | Orchard on-site reviews 5.0/52
preloved_signal_note: Common on Vinted; check all 24 pieces present — Orchard sells replacement pieces.
evidence_notes: Mumsnet names Orchard progressive jigsaws among trusted toddler puzzle brands.

key_specs: {"piece_count":"4 puzzles: 4-piece and 8-piece mix; 6 extra vehicle play pieces","dimensions":"each puzzle approx 16 x 12 cm","materials":"Chunky wipe-clean cardboard","included_items":"Construction vehicle jigsaws plus character/cone play pieces","other":"Progressive difficulty within one box"}
product_description_under_30_words: Four construction-vehicle jigsaws in one box — mix of four-piece and eight-piece puzzles — plus six extra vehicle play pieces.
ember_verdict: Age-honest 3+ mark and a built-in ladder: four-piece diggers first, eight-piece cement mixers when they want more trial-and-error. Vehicle interest keeps them at the table long enough to practise turning pieces.
personalization_hint: likely to be naming vehicles and lining up finished puzzles beside toy diggers
why_it_fits: Progressive 4→8 pieces inside the brief; honest 3+ age mark; distinct from farm/animal sets; strong Orchard durability reputation.
caveats: Eight-piece puzzles may need adult calm on first go — keep the four-piece ones out first. Extra play pieces are small; bag them if you still have a mouther.
gift_note: Strong for vehicle-mad nearly-threes; compact box, under £7 direct from Orchard.
ownership_note: Different enough from farm/animal first jigsaws to own alongside — unless you already have Orchard transport first-puzzle sets.
safety_notes: Not suitable under 3 years — small parts on play pieces.
review_quality_note: On-site sample small but consistently positive; Amazon listing also available under Orchard Big Wheels.
evidence_sources: orchardtoys.com | howleys.co.uk schema listing | Orchard on-site reviews
preloved_signal_note: Check all four puzzles and six play pieces — cardboard wears well.
evidence_notes: Amazon price varies; Orchard direct £6.50 checked 2026-07-21.

key_specs: {"piece_count":"4, 6, 8 and 12 pieces (four separate puzzles)","dimensions":"15 x 21.5 cm each completed","materials":"Cardboard","included_items":"Four farm-themed progressive jigsaws in one box","other":"SKU 1003913 — not the 18m 2–5 piece Galt first-puzzle line"}
product_description_under_30_words: Four farm jigsaws in one box stepping from four pieces up to twelve. Age-marked 3+ with clear animal scenes on each board.
ember_verdict: One box covers weeks of progression — four pieces to build confidence, twelve when they are ready to plan corners and edges. The 3+ mark is honest for nearly three; this is not the baby 18m Galt two-piece line repackaged.
personalization_hint: likely to be asking for the next puzzle in the box after finishing an easier one
why_it_fits: Progressive 4→12 in one purchase; honest 3+ age mark; budget-friendly; distinct from single-theme Orchard 12-piece pairs.
caveats: Cardboard is thinner than Ravensburger — store flat. Amazon ASIN availability fluctuates; Galt direct is reliable.
gift_note: Looks like more puzzle for the money — good unisex gift under £7.
ownership_note: If you already own Galt farm 4-in-a-box from an older child, move to jungle/vehicles variant or Orchard theme instead.
review_quality_note: Fewer aggregated UK reviews than Ravensburger/Orchard; strong specialist-retailer presence.
evidence_sources: galttoys.com SKU 1003913 | Amazon UK B0074HZZRU (alternate) | Multiple UK toy retailers listing 4-6-8-12 spec
preloved_signal_note: Very common budget puzzle set on resale sites.
substitute_if_unavailable: Ravensburger On The Farm My First — use 4–5 piece puzzles only (longlist rank 4)
evidence_notes: Do not confuse with Galt Ocean 2–5 piece 18m+ line (longlist rank 13).

product_name: On The Farm — My First Jigsaw Puzzles
key_specs: {"piece_count":"Four puzzles: 2, 3, 4 and 5 pieces","dimensions":"Small toddler puzzle format","materials":"Extra-thick Ravensburger cardboard","included_items":"Four separate farm-animal mini jigsaws","other":"Progressive piece count in one box"}
product_description_under_30_words: Four farm mini-jigsaws in one box — two, three, four and five pieces. Extra-thick Ravensburger cardboard with bold animal pictures.
ember_verdict: Box says 18m+ but at nearly three you want the four- and five-piece puzzles, not the two-piece warm-ups. Thick pieces survive repeated turning — good low-stakes practice before a 12-piece Orchard. Flag the age mark honestly in copy.
personalization_hint: likely to be finishing short puzzles quickly and asking for a harder one from the same box
why_it_fits: Excellent cardboard quality; massive Amazon review base; teaches turn-compare-try on 4–5 pieces before scaling up.
caveats: 18m box mark fails freshness if marketed as new-stage buy — position as use the top two puzzles only. Two-piece puzzles are too easy for most 34–36m children.
gift_note: Cheap, recognisable brand — fine as a stocking filler if recipient has no jigsaws yet.
ownership_note: If peg puzzles and 2-piece sets are already mastered, start on the 4–5 piece puzzles or skip to rank 1.
safety_notes: Standard small-parts guidance for youngest marked age.
review_quality_note: Long-running UK favourite; multiple parent blogs corroborate thick-piece quality.
evidence_sources: Amazon UK B008IZHSEA | In The Playroom review | Mum of a Premature Baby review
preloved_signal_note: Ubiquitous on resale — pieces hold up well.
substitute_if_unavailable: Galt 4 in a Box Farm (longlist rank 3)
evidence_notes: Strong consensus signal across Amazon + multiple UK parent blogs for My First line.

key_specs: {"piece_count":"3 puzzles x 6 pieces","dimensions":"15 x 11 cm each tray","materials":"FSC-certified wood","included_items":"Three separate safari scene boards","other":"Real interlocking wooden pieces — not peg lift-out"}
product_description_under_30_words: Three wooden safari jigsaws, six pieces each, in separate trays. Chunky FSC wood pieces with bold scene pictures.
ember_verdict: For parents who want something that survives being stepped on. Six pieces is enough to require a plan, but the small trays keep the picture visible. Good counterpoint to cardboard if you already own Orchard farm sets.
personalization_hint: likely to be naming animals and retrying the same tray until they can do it without help
why_it_fits: Real interlocking wood at 6 pieces; UK heritage brand; budget price; distinct material from cardboard picks.
caveats: Smaller completed size than Orchard 12-piece — less floor presence. Fewer aggregated online reviews than Amazon bestsellers.
gift_note: Compact wooden set — nice for families avoiding plastic; under £6.
ownership_note: Also available as Big Movers (vehicles) if safari animals are duplicated at home.
safety_notes: Conforms to current European safety standards per manufacturer.
review_quality_note: Specialist wooden-toy retailers stock widely; Lipscore on Bigjigs site.
evidence_sources: bigjigstoys.co.uk BJ818 | woodentoyshop.co.uk listing | timeless-toys.co.uk listing
evidence_notes: Wooden inset jigsaw — verify not peg puzzle when buying other Bigjigs lines.

caveats: Near-duplicate of rank 1 — pick one theme.

skip_reason: Peg puzzle for 12m+ — bring back out if still in the toy box; not a new nearly-three buy.
Two-piece baby first puzzles — fails freshness and strategy objective for 34–36m.

ember_verdict: Jigsaw sets are ideal borrow-from-a-friend or pre-loved buys — check all pieces and corner wear. Orchard and Ravensburger sell replacement pieces if one is missing.
Before buying, dig out peg puzzles and 2-piece sets from the toy box. If they are still challenging, start with Rescue Squad or Ravensburger 4–5 piece puzzles before 12-piece sets.
Hold off on 20+ piece floor puzzles and 50-piece character sets until 12-piece jigsaws feel easy — usually a few months after this band for most children.
